utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , it is so romantic to send people off on their honeymoon .

emotion_cause.span: 1_it is so romantic to send people off on their honeymoon .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , Monica and Chandler are married . Ross and Rachel are having a baby . Maybe you and I should do something .

emotion_cause.span: 2_Monica and Chandler are married . Ross and Rachel are having a baby . Maybe you and I should do something .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All in good time my love .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I left my guitar in their apartment .

utterances.text: I left my guitar in their apartment .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well you can let me in later .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not have a key , they took mine to give to you .
